name: Kayin State (Myanmar)
description: A horizontal tricolour of navy, white, and red with a rising sun — the Karen (Kayin) national flag.
history: Used by the Kayin State government as one of Myanmar's 14 first-level administrative subdivisions (seven regions and seven states, plus Naypyidaw Union Territory). Many regional and state flag designs follow a common pattern based on the national flag, charged with the regional seal.

features.symbolism: the flag of Kayin State, with the Kayin (Karen) state emblem at the centre on a horizontally-banded field
